text_block_list.text:
One morning, while I'm taking a stroll around the
academy...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Grow nice and healthy so your beautiful
flowers can bloom! ♪

I spot Nishino Flower tending to some flowers. In
the next moment...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
There you are, Nishino Flower! Teacher's been
looking for you. Something to do with your duties
today.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I mean... Thank you for telling me. I'll be
there right away.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Sure thing! Anyway, I'm done here, so bye!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh dear, what should I do?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I was really taking my time watering the flowers,
so I've only gotten around to half of them!
choice_data_list: Let's share the work and get it done faster!
I'll fill up the watering can for you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh... you'll help me?! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and please remember to talk to the flowers a
lot while you're watering them.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
They'll feel happier and bloom more beautifully if
you do!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for dragging you into this, but thank you
very much! I'll do my part as quickly as I can.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, I know! I'll talk to the flowers faster too!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Grow up nicely and broduce peautiful—ack!
P-produce beautiful flowers!
